examples: Economists emphasize measurable quantities – the number of jobs, the per capita income.
There is a growing body of opinion that both these physical variations have a measurable impact on the climate.
They insist that their conclusions are "measurable and actionable"—guides to behavior rather than analysis for its own sake.
Risk-free profits are captured by APs when a measurable ETF price discount or premium exists.
Unlike the broad traits supposedly assessed by personality tests, self-control struck Mischel as potentially measurable.
